title: astragalus hirsutus subsp. alindanus
intro: Astragalus hirsutus subsp. alindanus, also known as Chinese milkvetch, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus hirsutus subsp. alindanus include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and enhancing cardiovascular health. This plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
